app_scopes.name: global
app_scopes.description: Global scope - applies across all applications

roles.name: standard_user
roles.description: Standard user with basic read permissions

roles.name: system_admin
roles.description: System administrator with full system access

roles.name: digital_homesteader
roles.description: Manage own profile and blog posts from Digital Homestead

roles.name: digital_follower
roles.description: Follower: read profiles and social content for Digital Homestead

roles.name: client_profile_owner
roles.description: Owner of profile data via client-interface

roles.name: forgeofwill_standard_user
roles.description: Standard user for Forge of Will

roles.name: forgeofwill_planner
roles.description: Project planner role for Forge of Will (project-planning)

roles.name: forgeofwill_profile_owner
roles.description: Profile owner role for Forge of Will (profile integration)

roles.name: owner_console_standard_user
roles.description: Standard user for owner console (read-only access)

roles.name: owner_console_owner
roles.description: Owner with full admin rights in owner console

permissions.name: blog.blog.create
permissions.description: Create a blog (controller uses create:blog currently, mapping to standard)
